headline: Humana Expands Barostim Coverage What It Could Mean For Valuation
summary: Humana has issued a Medicare Advantage coverage policy for Barostim therapy for heart failure patients. The policy expands access to Barostim for Medicare Advantage members who meet currently approved indications. Coverage also extends to eligible participants in the BENEFIT-HF clinical trial, widening the potential patient pool. For investors watching NYSE:HUM, this move adds a fresh development to a stock that closed at $305.12. The share price sits alongside mixed multi year returns,...
